name: Inaba Foods Cat Treat Grilled Tuna In Flavored Broth
description: Delight your cat with Inaba Foods Grilled Tuna in Tuna Flavored Broth , a premium, hand-cut tuna fillet made from wholesome, high-quality ingredients. Each lightly grilled fillet is packed in a savory tuna-flavored broth to lock in moisture, helping to keep your feline hydrated and happy. Made with natural wild-caught tuna, these flaky fillets are vacuum-sealed in UV-blocking packaging to preserve freshness and flavor. Free from grains, preservatives, and artificial colors, they are enriched with Vitamin E for immunity and Green Tea Extract as an antioxidant, giving your cat a healthy and tasty treat. Perfect for handfeeding, topping wet or dry food, or as a special reward, these tender tuna fillets provide variety and excitement to your cat’s daily routine. Suitable for all life stages, from kittens to seniors. Key Benefits . Made with natural wild-caught tuna . Moisture-rich broth supports hydration . Grain-free, preservative-free, and no artificial colors . Enriched with Vitamin E & Green Tea Extract antioxidants . Ideal for handfeeding, topping, or treating . Vacuum-sealed for freshness . Suitable for kittens, adults, and senior cats Ingredients Tuna, Natural Tuna Flavored Broth, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 26.5% Crude Fat (min): 0.8% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 71% Vitamin E (min): 14 IU/kg Calories: 1277 kcal/kg | 19 kcal per piece Net Weight: 0.52 oz per fillet Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Provide fresh water daily. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve promptly to maintain freshness.
